content: Tawil last proper rerun is like 9 months ago
november last year was tawils last rerun
so, i have a proposition to you
you can feel free to ignore it as its not for everyone
but if you truly actually like Tawil

I'd actually reroll right now
and get a new account
and dedicate it to putting tawil's team together
she CAN work if you do this
if you really wanna use her

just be aware tawil needs a lot of dupes
you pull until Tawil is E2, that's her bare minimum for now
you can afford to sink in quite a few pulls
Tawil can be strong, but she needs a lot of dupes
her playstyle is also not really recommended for new players
I guess im sticking with my current account then.
about character strength in this game
even if tawil is weaker than ghelot
what matters is that you play with characters you enjoy
and that you put together teams you like playing
so its similair to limbus company in that regard?
the game has a lot of avenues of investment that u can put on your chars to make them stronger if they're struggling
the systems are rich and complex
so u can make people who are normally weak
if you put them in specific situations
very few characters are truly unviable or worthless
the endgame needs you to have 5 teams minimum
so even if other teams are stronger
your tawil will find a place
also, the endgame doesn't have a turn limit
so people who play slower, or need more time to ramp up their damage
can still be viable and clear
i mean it when i say this: if you like someone, play them
i mean mobfights have a soft turn limit
other games where endgame has like
it's night and day in morimens
